description: Subtracts two 3D vectors component-wise, returning the difference vector A minus B. Uses the displacement of each input. Can also be done via trace3d(G, V, type(diff), W).
utility: Subtract two 3D vectors and return the difference vector

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 3, 2, 1)
B = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 0)
D = vecdiff3d(G, A, B)

examples.scenario: Visualize relative displacement between two direction vectors
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, c(red))
B = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 3, 0, c(blue))
D = vecdiff3d(G, A, B, c(orange))
